snippet.description:

► Amazon: http://smarturl.it/Fobije/az

Music, arrangement & mix: Joca Stefanović
Lyrics: Jovana Radosavljević


#FOBIJE

Ide priča da u oku mom đavo stanuje
Noć je gore
Jutra hladna k’o led

Da se svima
Pakao samo raduje
Jer tu ljubav ne stiže na red

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Pored mene
Samo ranjene duše padaju
K’o da sada
Samo radim na zlo
Baš od one,
One što za ljubav bi dala sve
Jedan posto
Nije ostalo

A ti znaš, zar ne?!
Nisam kriva ja
Posle tebe bol me je
Loše skrojila

Nema sad šanse da opet volim
Pancir sa ovog srca da sklonim
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije
Jer još uvek me
Lome fobije
Da me isti kalibar ne ubije

Music: Bojan Vasić
Lyrics: Aleksandar Tomić-Tomica, Edita Aradinović
Arrangement: Bojan Vasić
Backing vocals: Edita Aradinović
Trumpet: Miloš Nikolić
Piano: Bojan Vasić
Violin: Ema Lukić
Guitar: Saša Sedlar
Bass: Miroslav Tovirac
Drums: Vladimir Ružičić
Mix: Jan Magdevski
Master: Jan Magdevski

🎵 Stream:
Deezer: http://bit.ly/2Zw8yUw
Spotify: http://spoti.fi/3pHmo0W
Apple: http://apple.co/2NqaWtp

Directed by: Nemanja Novaković
DoP: Lazar Bogdanović
Producer: Aleksandar Pejčić
Video Production: NN-media +38162357368

Editing: Nemanja Novaković/Aleksandar Kasalica
Color Correction: Nikola Marinković
Camera: Artcorestudio
Lighting: Sapa Light

Actor: Nikola 

Makeup: Ena Jović
Costume: Dijana Malnar
Hair: Jovana Jeremić



LYRICS:
Svaki sat, svaki sprat ja sam brojala,
Noćima ispred tvojih vrata plakala.
I kad ljubav u tebi ne osećam,
Ne dam ja na tebe - MOJE.

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Moj si lom, moj si slom, moj si brodolom,
Ja u tebi sve sam našla.

Moj si, moj savršen greh, neću, ne želim da stanem,
Ja bih da zagrlim te, a ti bi da odeš odavde.
Moj si, moj melek, moj bol!
Kako da pomerim s’ tobom kraj?
U oči dok gledam te sad, k’o dete u porušen grad...

Vidim sve, čujem sve, sve predosećam,
Nisi lep, nisi dobar, nisi čaroban.
Boli kad zaplače u meni ta devojčica, što voli te, voli te, voli te...

Copying, re-uploading and illegally distributing this copyrighted work is strictly prohibited! ©

snippet.title: VELIKA ILUZIJA 5S 147 EM // Specijal: Dara iz Jasenovca
snippet.description:
U specijalu posvećenom filmu "Dara iz Jasenovca", čija je ekskluzivna svetska televizijska premijera na RTS-u, u "Krupnom planu" je reditelj Predrag Gaga Antonijević.

Zbog čega se film pre zvanične bioskopske premijere u Srbiji zakazane za 22. april kada se obeležava 76 godina od proboja poslednjih zarobljenika iz logora Jasenovac, prikazuje na televiziji? U kojoj meri su negativni prikazi bili opretećenje za film u kontekstu trke za oskarovsku nominaciju? Zbog čega "Dara iz Jasenovca" izaziva reakcije i napade onih koji relativizuju zločine? Pored reditelja, u specijalu govore scenaristkinja Nataša Drakulić, glumci Biljana Čekić, Marko Janketić, Igor Đorđević, Nikolina Freganović, Anja Stanić Ilić, scenograf Goran Joksimović, kompozitori Aleksandra Kovač i Roman Goršek.

Autor emisije: Sandra Perović
Realizacija: Marija Aranđelović, Svetlana Perović, Marko Jeftić.

Label and copyright: Radio-televizija Srbije
 
Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

snippet.title: Watch NASA’s Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

snippet.title: RIJEKA vs HAJDUK 0:1 (23.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U novom Jadranskom derbiju, susretu 23. kola HT Prve lige, Hajduk je s 1:0 pobijedio Rijeku na Rujevici.

Posljednja ligaška utakmica Hajduka bila je ona prije dva i pol tjedna baš na Rujevici, a i tada su Splićani slavili s minimalnih 1:0 (zaostali susret).

No, ovaj put je Hajduk ostavio mnogo bolji dojam, a u premijeri je Marko Livaja pokazao kako će biti veliko pojačanje Hajduka. Mnogo toga je pokazao i Kačaniklić, također novi igrač na Poljudu, koji je ušao u igru u drugom poluvremenu.

Igralo se otvoreno s obje strane, no Hajduk je kao rijetko kada ove sezone djelovao vrlo organizirano i konkretno. Livaja je bio sjajan u igri prema naprijed, dok je dva gola Umuta Nayira poništio VAR. No, u 73. minuti je Turčin zabio i treći put, na odličnu asistenciju Livaje, što je bio gol odluke.

Rijeka je potom nasrnula na suparnika i u 96. minuti dobila idealnu priliku za izjednačenje. Andrijašević je izveo jedanaesterac, ali je Kalinić obranio i sačuvao Hajduku tri boda.

Hajduk je Rijeci došao na samo tri boda zaostatka, a ima i odigranu utakmicu manje.

HT Prva liga, 23. kolo: Rijeka - Hajduk 0:1 (Umut Nayir 73.)

snippet.title: Vladika Porfirije pjeva četničke pjesme
snippet.description:
Novi patrijarh SPC-a Porfirije, do danas mitropolit zagrebačko-ljubljanski osvanuo je prije pet godina na video snimku, kako u zanimljivom društvu pjeva četničku pjesmu posvećenu četničkom vojvodi Momčilu Đujiću, ratnom zločincu iz Drugog svjetskog rata.

Snimak je navodno nastao prije pet godina u Chicagu.

- Nakon liturgije bio je ručak i zabava, rekao sam Voji Bilbiji da otpjeva "našu pjesmu", misleći na "Tamo daleko". On je počeo pjevati pjesmu koju i ne znam i nekako sam pjevušio za njima, malo iznenađen što nije zapjevao onu koju sam mislio, pa sam u jednom trenutku i zašutio - pravdao se Porfirije u hrvatskim medijima rekavši da je zašutio kada se pjevalo o "kokardi vojvode Đujića".

Iz snimke se jasno vidi da je Perić velik dio pjesme zaista opjevao, a već od početka same pjesme jasno je da se radi o pjesmi ratne tematike s obzirom da se spominju "mitraljesci" i "granate".

- Šta se ono na Dinari sjaji, Đujićeva kokarda na glavi - kaže sporni stih, a teško je procijeniti je li Porfirije zaista, kako tvrdi, prestao pjevati.

Pop Momčilo Đujić četnički je vojvoda i ratni zločinac odgovoran za neke od najgnusnijih zločina na ovim područjima u Drugom svjetskom ratu. Đujićevi četnici jedan od najvećih pokolja napravili su u selu Gata u zaleđu Omiša kada su 1.oktobra 1942. godine zvjerski poklali 95 civila.
tags: Šta se ono na Dinari sjaji

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover’s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.description:

https://www.instagram.com/shtuka.db/
Master: Billain
https://www.instagram.com/billain_aethek/


Video production: Dino Kadragic Videography
Direction/DP/Production/Color: Dino Kadragić
https://www.instagram.com/dinokadragic.videography/
Direction: Muhamed Hadžović
https://www.instagram.com/muhamedhadzovicofficial/
Cam/DP assistant: Goran Jovanović
FP: Draško Babić



@EMDC YouTube


Text:

Ref:
Ja sam hazla 

Cunami PBR THC geng vrti Sarajevo ooo 
Flo gros patroliram šeherom
Adrese stižem ko amazon 
Na licu osmijeh in da biznis zone
Na cosku s gengom iznad zuji dron
Lobe brado baro gori marlboro

Samo sport ooo ovo moj je sport uouuo 
Siempre pronto siempre pronto
Textil OG kush ganjamo plus
Zakucava kazaljka radijus
Ne mogu ništa pa kazne nam pišu
Evo na kafu pa odjebi U
(Hazla)

Ref:
Ja sam hazla

Od para suhe ruke tvrde od vratila
Ambicije biznisi price u kvadratima
Nista telefoni samo turska kupatila
Mala nam evropa jasemo ko Atila

Jangeri u spremi niko ne da na svoj blok
Cjevanicama punim hladno udara se štok
Za desetoro brace mati sprema wok 
Nagazili šmekera podrum soba shock

Ljubav u mahali drama scenario
Rumeni obrazi al nije kardio

Sudbina takva keš ćemo duplat
Kurve se žale da neće se udat
Dobrom se robom ko sefte lupat
Oprat kešovinu korov počupat

Ref:
Ja sam hazla


℗ Cunami Flo

Sen Çal Kapımı Resmi Youtube Kanalı: https://bit.ly/3dxNPVW

Kerem Bürsin ve Hande Erçel’in yanı sıra Neslihan Yeldan, İlayda Çevik, Evrim Doğan, Anıl İlter, Melisa Döngel, Çağrı Çıtanak, Elçin Afacan, Sitare Akbaş, Başak Gümülcinelioğlu, Alican Aytekin, Sarp Bozkurt, İlkyaz Arslan gibi birbirinden başarılı isimleri barındıyor.


#SenÇalKapımı #KeremBürsin #HandeErçel

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Zoran Branković - Velja Nevolja je dokaz da je viteštvo nestalo sa asfalta! (26.2.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Zoran Lepi Branković, momak sa voždovačkog asfalta i legenda devedesetih. Videvši svoj uzor u starijima poput Đorđa Božovića Giške, uz svoju braću Rukija i Sašu, prijatelje Aleksandra Kneževića Kneleta, Kristijana Golubovića, Bojana Banovića i ostale odrastao je u vremenima vrelog beogradskog asfalta. Poznavao je Željka Ražnatovića Arkana, Sredoja Šljukića Šljuku, Zorana Uskokovića Skoleta, Radeta Ćaldovića Ćentu i mnoge druge koji su otišli u legendu. Godine provedene u zatvorima i meci koji su ga pogađali nisu uspeli da ga pokolebaju. Samo je postao jači i odlučniji da zauvek sačuva status čoveka koji se ničega ne plaši. Upravo zbog svoje odlučnosti nije sačekao da mu istekne zatvorska kazna koju služi, već je rešio da s "nanogicom" objasni zbog čega su devedesete bile opasno vreme i zašto njihov duh i daje provejava beogradskim ulicama. Preporučujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate više o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 19.02.2021. godine u našim prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavković.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i žele da pomognu rad naše produkcije to mogu učiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudićemo se da ostanemo dosledni našoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i širenju istine bez cenzure.

*************************************************************

Rad naše produkcije možete podržati kupovinom majica, dukserica, šolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promovišu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne žele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poštuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji čuvaju sećanje na naše slavne pretke.

snippet.title: ULIČNI SVIRAČ SE OPROSTIO OD BALAŠEVIĆA: Poslušajte pesmu zbog koje se svi prolaznici naježe
snippet.description:
Ulični svirač Zoran koji Novosađane uglavnom uveseljava svojom muzikom i izvedbom na gitari, ove noće napravio je izuzetak i oprostio se od novosadskog mornara - Đorđa Balaševića. Zoran je imao priliku da upozna Balaševića, a ovom prilikom je konstatovao da je njegov odlazak veliki gubitak za Novi Sad.

snippet.title: Sefirin Kızı 42. Bölüm 2. Fragman
snippet.description:
Sefirin Kızı bütün bölümleri startv.com.tr'de → https://www.startv.com.tr/dizi/sefirin-kizi/bolumler

Sefirin Kızı'na Abone Olmak İçin → http://bit.ly/sfrn-kizi-dd-sub

Yaktığı kulübeyi Melek için yerine koymaya çalışan Sancar için hayatın bambaşka planları vardır. Hiç beklenmedik bir anda beklenmedik bir yerde karşısına çıkan gizemli bir kadın, Sancar’ın yaşamını sonsuza dek değiştirecektir.

Sancar, peşine takıldığı gizemi çözmeye çalışırken bir yandan da bilinmezliklerle dolu bu kadını kendisine rağmen korumaya uğraşır.

Yapım: NGM ve O3 Medya
Yönetmen: Emre Kabakuşak 
Senaryo: Eylem Canpolat - Ozan Aksungur - Defne Gürsoy - Oğuz Ayaz - Gamze Arslan Çelik - Ozanser Uğurlu

Oyuncu Kadrosu:
Sancar Efeoğlu: Engin Akyürek
Mavi: Tuba Büyüküstün
Bora: Ferit Aktuğ
Yahya: Doğukan Polat
Elvan: Hivda Zizan Alp
Refika: Özlem Çakar Yalçınkaya
Güven: Erdal Küçükkömürcü
Halise: Gonca Cilasun
Müge: Esra Kızıldoğan
Zehra: Cemre Öktem
Kavruk Ömer: Edip Tepeli
Melek: Beren Gençalp
Kahraman: Bülent Şakrak
Ceylan: Gözde Çığacı
Dudu: İlayda Ildır
Necdet: Sami Aksu
Gülsiye: Yağmur Başkurt

#SefirinKızı #SefirinKızıS2

Zapratite Janu Dačović:

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/janadacovic/

Danas smo imali posebnog gosta - Jana Dačović  je osoba koju sam upoznao pre par godina i u proteklih par godina smo kroz svašta prošli.

snippet.title: AVDULJ “KAFE ZALE”: Sad živim kao Bog!!!
snippet.description:
Avdulj Asanaj posle hitova “Kafe Zale” i “Normalno” definitivno je nova zvezda trep folk pravca! U prethodnoj emisiji nam je vlasnik “Kafe Zale”, Dušan, otkrio da su ove dve pesme koštale 2.000 evra, a sada nam Avdulj priča kako je bilo na snimanju spota, koliko naplaćuje nastupe i šta je glavni krivac za njegove prste.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32’ to tie at one and added two more in the 65’ and 85’. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70’ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27’ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: Emanet 127. Bölüm Fragmanı | Legacy Episode 127 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Yemin 316. Bölüm | The Promise Season 3 Episode 316
snippet.description:
Yemin 316. Bölüm Özeti:

Yiğit için konakta kalmayı kabul etse de Feride henüz Emir’i affedebilmiş değildir. Yaşadıklarını bir türlü unutamayan Feride Emir’e karşı çok ağır konuşur. Feride ile Emir bu çıkmazın içinde daha ne kadar kalacaklar. Öte yandan Cavidan, Talaz’ın takibi sırasında kaza geçirir. Cavidan ölüm ile burun buruna gelmiştir. Düğün arifesinde hiçbir aksilik çıkmamıştır ve iki aşık sonunda muratlarına ererler. Bundan sonra onları Narin ile Kemal’i mutlu günler beklemektedir.

Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscríbete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kırımlı is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father’s death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew… Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle’s arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kırımlı family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kırımlı mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: See Mars Like Never Before! NASA's Perseverance Rover Sends New Video and Images of the Red Planet
snippet.description: NASA’s Perseverance Mars Rover safely touched down on the Red Planet on Feb. 18. So what will the robotic scientist "see" on her descent and what will she do next? Join mission experts for update about the rover – the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space – including imagery it captured and its mission to explore Mars.

snippet.title: Sen Çal Kapımı 33. Bölüm
snippet.description:
Eda ve Serkan masum bir uykunun kollarındayken, Selin ve Deniz’e yakalanırlar. Selin’in ne olursa olsun Serkan’dan vazgeçmeye niyeti yoktur. Serkan o geceden sonra Eda ile ilgili duygularını sorgulamaya başlar. Eda ise, her şeye rağmen aşkı için pes etmeyip oyuna devam eder. Serkan, Eda’ya giden kalbine güvenmeyi seçip aklındaki sorularla ona gitmeye karar verir. Peki bu gidiş Serkan’a Eda’yı hatırlatacak mıdır?

Sen Çal Kapımı Ailesine Katılmak için: https://bit.ly/3jB1Rsj﻿
Sen Çal Kapımı Resmi Youtube Kanalı: https://bit.ly/3dxNPVW

Kerem Bürsin ve Hande Erçel’in yanı sıra Neslihan Yeldan, İlayda Çevik, Evrim Doğan, Anıl İlter, Melisa Döngel, Çağrı Çıtanak, Elçin Afacan, Sitare Akbaş, Başak Gümülcinelioğlu, Alican Aytekin, Sarp Bozkurt, İlkyaz Arslan gibi birbirinden başarılı isimleri barındıyor.


#kokundaaşkvar #KeremBürsin #HandeErçel

snippet.title: Dirljiv oproštaj od Balaševića i na splitskom Peristilu
snippet.description:
#Peristil #Split #Balasevic
Brojni obožavatelji s tugom se opraštaju od legendarnog kantautora Đorđa Balaševića. Najemotivnije je u njegovu Novom Sadu gdje su mu, pjevajući njegove pjesme, počast odale stotine ljudi. Zastave su ondje spuštene na pola koplja.

Paljenjem svijeća i pjevanjem njegovih pjesama, od Đoleta, kako ga od milja zovu, opraštaju se i obožavatelji diljem Hrvatske. Od legendardnog glazbenika oprostili su se brojni građani i na splitskom Peristilu.

HRTi: https://hrti.hrt.hr/home
HRT web portal: https://www.hrt.hr/
HRT FB: https://www.facebook.com/HRTnovimediji/

snippet.title: Masumiyet 2. Bölüm 2. Fragmanı | Hiçbir Şey Cezasız Kalmaz
snippet.description:
Masumiyet 2. Bölüm 2. Fragmanı

Evli ve iki çocuk annesi Bahar’ın (Deniz Çakır) hayatı, 19 yaşındaki kızının yanlış bir adama aşık olmasıyla değişir. Kızı Ela’nın (İlayda Alişan) ilk aşkı, yaşıtı bir üniversite öğrencisi değil babasının, başkasıyla evlenmek üzere olan 35 yaşındaki patronudur. Kızını bu yanlış ilişkiden kurtarmaya çalışan Bahar, ne yapsa da olacakların önüne geçemez. Bahar ve ailesinin hayatı, Ela’nın 19. yaş gününde sonsuza kadar değişir.

Masumiyet Çarşamba 20.00'de FOX'ta!

OYUNCULAR: HÜLYA AVŞAR, MEHMET ASLANTUĞ, DENİZ ÇAKIR, İLAYDA ALİŞAN, SERKAY TÜTÜNCÜ, DENİZ IŞIN, SELEN UÇER, TOLGA GÜLEÇ, NESLİHAN ARSLAN, ASENA TUĞAL, ERTUĞRUL POSTOĞLU, ALAYÇA ÖZTÜRK GİDİŞLİ, KİMYA GÖKÇE AYTAÇ, GİZEM ERGÜN, ASENA KESKİNCİ, OZAN KAYA OKTU, SEVGİ TEMEL, RÜÇHAN ÇALIŞKUR

FOX Resmi Web Sitesi: https://www.fox.com.tr
Masumiyet: https://www.fox.com.tr/Masumiyet/izle
Resmi Facebook Sayfası: https://www.facebook.com/masumiyetfox/

#Masumiyet #FOX #FOXplay

snippet.title: Plazma torta sa milka čokoladom, pojela se odmah pa sam ponovo pravila da bih vam uslikala presek.
snippet.description:
Nisam se nadala da će u roku od pola sata ,,nestati"ove torte i da ću ostati bez preseka i slike (a bez toga vam ne mogu pustiti recept)..tako da sam je opet pravila, što je mojima savršeno odgovaralo :)
Torta sa plazma keksom, milka čokoladom i lešnicima. Odmah se pojela bez obzira što spada u one torte kojih je dovoljno jedno parče. Korice su lagane od belanaca (nisu sušene) i plazma keksa.
#milkatorta #plazmatorta #rođendansketorte
svečane torte
torte sa korama
Recepte možete čitati na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/plazma-torta-sa-milka-cokoladom.html


Sastojci i priprema:
Kora:

- 5 belanaca
- 5 kašika šećera
- 1,5 kašika brašna
- 5 kašika mlevene plazme

3 - 4 kašike vode ili mleka za prelivanje pečenih kora

Prave se ovakve 3 kore.

Umutiti belanca i šećer u čvrst sneg. Umešati brašno i plazmu. Peći u zagrejanoj rerni na 180 stepeni do 20 minuta. Pečene kore premazati vodom ili mlekom, 3-4 kašike je dovoljno.

Fil:

- 15 žumanaca
- 150 gr. šećera
- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina
- 100 gr. crne milka čokolade
- 100 gr. bele milka čokolade
- 200 gr. mlevene plazme
- 100 gr. mlevenih lešnika (lepše ako su predhodno pečeni)
- 300 ml. slatke pavlake

Umutiti žumanca sa šećerom i kuvati na pari uz neprestano mešanje, oko 10 minuta.
Ostaviti da se ohladi. Za to vreme rastopiti čokolade, umutiti maslac i slatku pavlaku.
U fil mikserom umešati maslac i četiri pune kašike slatke pavlake.
Umešati lešnike i plazma keks. Podeliti fil na dva dela, u jedna deo staviti rastopljenu tamnu čokoladu u drugi deo rastopljenu belu čokoladu.

Na tacnu staviti kalup i u njemu filovati tortu.
Kora, tamniji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora, svetliji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora. Odozgo izmešati ostatake filova, uvek ostavim kašiku-dve fila i malo slatke pavlake. To mi bude fil s kojim premažem treću koru. 
Možete ukrasiti šlagom ili rastopljenom čokoladom.
Torta mora da odstoji jedna dan u frižideru pa tek onda seći i poslužiti.
Prijatno!

en.title: Cake with milk chocolate and ground biscuits, the best cake ever!
en.description:
#cake #chocolate #recipes
Ingredients and preparation:

Biscuit:
- 5 egg whites
- 5 tablespoons of sugar
- 1.5 tablespoons of flour
- 5 tablespoons ground biscuits

3-4 tablespoons of water or milk for topping baked biscuits

Prepare three biscuits.

Whisk egg whites and sugar. Stir in flour and ground biscuits. Bake in a preheated oven at 180 degrees for up to 20 minutes. Coat the baked biscuits with water or milk, 3-4 tablespoons is enough.

Cream:

- 15 egg yolks
- 150 gr. sugar
- 200 gr. butter or margarine
- 100 gr. dark milka chocolate
- 100 gr. white milk chocolate
- 200 gr. ground biscuits
- 100 gr. hazelnuts (better if pre-baked)
- 300 ml. whipped cream

Whisk the egg yolks with the sugar and cook on a steamer with a constant question, about 10 minutes.
Allow to cool. Meanwhile, melt the chocolate, whisk the butter. Whip the whipped cream.
Add 4 tablespoons of whipped cream to the filling, whisk.
Stir in hazelnuts and biscuits. Divide the filling into two parts, put melted dark chocolate in one part and melted white chocolate in the other part.

Fill the cake.
Biscuit, darker filling, whipped cream, biscuit, lighter filling, whipped cream, crust. Mix the rest of the fillings on top, I always leave a spoonful or two of filling and a little sweet sour cream. This is my filling with which I coat the third biscuit.
You can decorate with whipped cream or melted chocolate.
The cake must stand for one day in the refrigerator, cut and serve.
Enjoy !

Ostavio sam svoje dane u noći,

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies

localized.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
localized.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.title: Fixing My Old Artwork #2
snippet.description:
Get Honey for FREE today ▸ http://joinhoney.com/moriah
Honey finds coupons with the click of a button. Thanks to Honey for sponsoring! #AD

Hey guys! Today I  I dug up some more of my old, childhood artwork and chose a couple (really bad) drawings that I am going to re-do them as an adult and see if I can improve them! These are really poorly done drawings, so I do a fair amount of roasting (you've been warned 😂 ), but remember if you are a beginner artist, it's okay to not make great art at first. In fact, even if you've been doing art for a long time (*cough* ME), it's okay if your art isn't the best. Don't fall into the trap of comparing yourself to other artists or put too much pressure on yourself. Most of us are just doing this art thing for fun. So do whatever is enjoy able for you! Okay. that's the end of my talk now 😂 

This is kinda similar to the "draw this again" challenges I've seen from other youtubers. I was originally going to title this "Re-doing my childhood artwork." BUT I realized this video has a super similar format to my squishy makeovers. There's an art critique section (squishy roasting) and it's all about taking something that doesn't look it's best and transforming it into something new. 

I ended up using a bunch of different media for these different drawings including watercolor, colored pencils, digital art with ipad and procreate and watercolor pencils.

Please let me know if you would like to see me do anymore videos like this and if there are any more drawings from the pile that you would like to see me redo in the future. I had a blast with this, and it would be a great way to fill my sketchbook which has been a little neglected lol.


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh 😂 ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages.
